name: Asparagus Red Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Break off (do not cut) the woody portion of the asparagus stem. If you bend fresh asparagus, it will automatically snap at the end of the tender portion. Snap the tender ends into 2-inch pieces.
2. Place in a steamer and steam for 15 minutes until tender yet slightly firm. Rinch and cool with cold water.
3. Roast red pepper in a 500°F (260°C) oven for 20-30 minutes, turning occasionally.
4. Remove from the oven and let cool for 30 minutes. Peel off the skin and remove seeds. Slice into julienned strips.
5. Mix dressing ingredients and toss with asparagus and red pepper. Serve at room temperature.
6. Keeps several days in the fridge.
